atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical examination reveals edema and erythema in the right knee

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's right knee pain is diagnosed as an acute exacerbation of underlying arthritis.

atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has a history of kidney transplant.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: No acute findings suggest a new injury or infection.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Prescribe ultram 50 mg every six hours as needed for pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Order an autoimmune panel to rule out inflammatory conditions.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Advise the patient to take it easy and avoid activities that exacerbate his pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Schedule a follow-up appointment in four weeks to assess progress and adjust treatment as needed.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Refer to physical therapy for further evaluation and management.
